---
title: "Unit 5: Linear Equations"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '../unit5-linear')
from LinearEquations import generate
from collections import defaultdict

# ── CONFIGURATION ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# QMD controls: which types, seed, show_solutions
# Python controls: count per type, layout per type
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
data = generate(
    types=[
        # LT1 — One-step
        "one_step_add",
        "one_step_mult",
        "one_step_div",
        # LT2 — Two-step
        "two_step",
        "two_step_div",
        "two_step_bracket",
        # LT3 — Both sides
        "both_sides",
        "both_sides_bracket",
        # LT4 — Expand
        "expand_single",
        "expand_double",
        "expand_cancel",
        "bracket_neg",
        # LT5 — Fractions
        "frac_simple",
        "frac_both_sides",
        "frac_add",
        "frac_four_terms",
        # LT6 — Word problems
        "word_problem",
        # LT7 — Geometry
        "geo_triangle_perimeter",
        "geo_triangle_angles",
        "geo_trapezium",
        "geo_rectangle",
        "geo_isosceles",
    ],
    seed           = 42,
    show_solutions = True,
)

# Group by difficulty for tabs
grouped = defaultdict(list)
for ex in data["_exercises_qmd"]:
    grouped[ex["difficulty"]].append(ex)
```

## 🎯 Learning Targets

{{< include Linear-Learning-Targets.qmd >}}

## 🗂️ Formula Card

{{< include Linear-Formulas.qmd >}}

## 📝 Practice Problems

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("easy", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("medium", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("hard", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

## ⚡ Test Your Knowledge

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../assets/worksheet.css">

<script src="../../assets/worksheet.js"></script>

<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="wsGenerate()" disabled>🔄 New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="wsOpenPreview()">👁️ Preview & Print</button>
    <a href="https://app.flintk12.com/activities/equation-solvin-77c61a/sessions/new" target="_blank" class="ws-btn flint">🤖 Get Help</a>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">⏳ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<div id="ws-container"></div>

<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">🖨️ Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">✕ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>

<script>
window.WS_CONFIG = {
  title:    "Linear Equations",
  unit:     "Unit 5 · Linear Equations",
  pyPath:   "LinearEquations.py",
  template: "word",
  // Worksheet uses equation types only (grid layout)
  // count and layout controlled by Python REGISTRY
  types: [
    "one_step_add",
    "one_step_mult",
    "two_step",
    "two_step_bracket",
    "both_sides",
    "both_sides_bracket",
    "expand_single",
    "expand_double",
    "frac_simple",
    "frac_both_sides",
    "expand_cancel",
    "bracket_neg"
  ]
};
</script>
```
